name: agency-agents-fork
description: 163 specialist agent personas + 24 routing skills + 16 NEXUS strategy playbooks + 2 hooks. Fork of msitarzewski/agency-agents with China-market agents excluded and Korean + Japanese Business Navigators added. Installable two ways: as a user-level config bundle via scripts/install.ps1, or as a Claude Code plugin via scripts/build-plugin.ps1 -> dist/plugin/.

user_level_bundle.description: Copies agents into ~/.claude/agents/ and skills into ~/.claude/skills/ — no namespacing, immediately usable

plugin_build.description: Generates a Claude Code plugin-loader-conformant directory at dist/plugin/ (flat agents/ + hooks/hooks.json + clean manifest). Skills become /agency-agents-fork:<name>.

installation.note: Source-of-truth is the division-organized .md files (academic/, design/, engineering/, ...). The plugin build flattens them into dist/plugin/agents/; the source layout is preserved for browsing.
